stem: For a science fair, Mira measured the water level in a tank over time. The function h(x) = 24 − 0.12x gives the estimated water level, in centimeters, of the tank x days after the start of the measurement. Which of the following is the best interpretation of 24 in this context?

answerOptions.content: The estimated change in water level, in centimeters, each day
The estimated water level, in centimeters, of the tank at the start of the measurement
The estimated number of days for all the water to drain
The estimated water level, in centimeters, of the tank at the end of the measurement period

rationale:
Choice B is correct. In h(x) = 24 − 0.12x, the constant 24 is the value of h(0), which represents the water level at the start of the measurement (when x = 0 days).

Choice A is the daily rate of change (0.12). Choice C is unrelated. Choice D confuses initial with final.
